dialogos.texto_en: Raiha-chan, how was dinner?
It was super delicious! I'm so full!
I couldn't quite tell what some of the dishes were,\nbut they were all really tasty.
Okinawan cuisine often uses unusual ingredients,\ndoesn't it.\nThough that is what it's famous for.
The cake for dessert was also amazing!\nIt was so good that it surprised Itsuki.\nNow that's a good cake!
(After dinner, Raiha invited me to their room,\n and they were even more energetic than usual.)
(We're staying at a luxurious hotel, and dining\n at a restaurant. Plus, we're starting our sightseeing\n tomorrow...it's no wonder they're so excited.)
But, is it okay to be having this much fun\non the first day?
It's okay, Raiha-chan.\nWe came here to have fun, after all!
This trip is an extravagant adventure\nfilled with exciting activities,\nso there's still room to have more fun.
An extravagant adventure, huh...
Oh, that reminds me, let's review\nthe travel guide that Yotsuba-san made.\nI'll go get it!
Yotsuba, thank you for inviting Raiha.
Don't worry about it, I only suggested it.\nIchika and the others were the ones who\nagreed to it.
I see. It's just that...\nAfter that, it seems\nthings with your sisters have gotten better.
(After I confessed,\n things were awkward for a while...)
Okay.\nI'm sorry for worrying you\nso much back then.
There's no need to apologize.\nBesides, it's not easy for family members\nto discuss and resolve issues like that.
That's right...
Of course, things have changed since then, you know?\nBut everything's okay now.
Cause, like...\nThanks to everyone.\nI can be next to you now.
Just like how I was able to change,\neveryone else is moving forward too.
I see.
Ehehe...
...R-Raiha?\nWhy are you grinning like that?
I was just thinking, you two get along so well.
U-umm, I guess so...\nAhahaha...
Hey, hey, Yotsuba-san.\nWhat did big bro say when he confessed?
PFFTUH?!
FWEEH?!
H-h-hold on a sec!\nYou can't just ask that in front of me!
Oh, okay. Then, if big bro isn't here,\nwill you tell me?
W-what?! No way! And Yotsuba,\ndon't just blurt things out\nbecause Raiha asked you to, okay?!
I'm in total agreement with him.\nI'm sorry, Raiha-chan.
Booo, you're so STINGY, big bro!
Some things I just won't let up on,\neven if you hit me with a pillow.
I won't stop until you surrender, big bro!
Ha-ha-ha! Do you really think that kind of attack\nwill work on me?
(I don't want Raiha to hear about my embarrassments.\n If I wait a little longer, she'll get tired and give\n up, and then we can talk about something else...)
Huh?\nSay, Yotsuba-san?
Yes, what is it?
Why are there so many pillows here?\nWe only need two, one for me and one for you.
W-well, um... I asked the hotel\nto prepare them for us...
Ah! Could it be that you were planning\nto stay in this room, big bro?
PFFTUH?!
WHAAA?!\nThat's not it! Not it at all!
(Oh, it's not... I see...\n Wait, why am I disappointed?!)
Um, this is a bit embarrassing to admit, but...
Actually, I'm a really bad sleeper.\nSo I always put another pillow at the foot of the bed\nwhen I sleep.
Like, if there are pillows on both ends of the bed,\nI don't have to worry about changing positions\nwhile I sleep.
Oh, so that's why.
I wonder how bad your sleep has to be\nto come up with an idea like that...
It's not like I do it on purpose, you know.\nWhen we were living in an apartment,\nI was often scolded by Miku, who slept next to me.
Hmm.\nThat means you'll be in big trouble, big bro.
My sleeping position isn't that bad, you know.\nYou know that.
That's not what I meant.
*sigh*\nBig bro, the ignorance you have of your own\nlove life isn't so easily fixed, is it.
...Huh?
After hearing about you two,\nI was thinking I'd get to see what it would be like\nto date someone.
But, when I see\nthe two of you together, it's a little different.
Big bro and Yotsuba-san, it's like you're\nmore good friends than lovers.
...So, that's how it looks, eh?
Ahaha... Nino and Miku\nsay the same thing to me all the time.
Ah, but! There's no right way to date,\nand if it works for you two,\nthen that's what's important.
*sigh*\nYou really are mature, Raiha-chan.
You're almost in college, aren't you? Yotsuba?
Uwaaa that's right!
(And yet...it's like we're friends, huh?\n Even Raiha's saying that.)
(Certainly, as we are now, I feel\n like we can't really be seen as lovers.)
(Then, we really do need to deepen our relationship\n on this trip, and maybe I should take the lead\n and finally kiss her...)
That's right. Yotsuba-san is also going to college,\nso you two need to be more proactive.
P-proactive?
Like, kissing big bro%p-2;――
C-can we change the topic?!\nWhy don't we talk about it tomorrow, huh?!
Tomorrow is the main event of this trip!\nWe're going the beach!
Wow, an Okinawan beach.\nIt must be really beautiful.
You should look forward to tomorrow Raiha-chan.\nWe have a barbecue and a lot of beach activities\nplanned for everyone.
Yeah!\nHey, what kind of activities are we going to do?
Hee-hee.\nThat's a surprise for tomorrow.\nI'm sure you'll love it though!
This is a commemorative trip \ncelebrating our graduation after all.
I'm gonna make this the best trip\nthat no one will forget!
I see.
(That's Yotsuba for you...\n In that respect, she hasn't changed at all.)
(Maybe...I'm just a little too tense.)
(Our graduation trip has just begun.\n First, let's make fun memories together\n just like Yotsuba wants.)
All right, the main event starts tomorrow!\nDon't oversleep, either of you!
Yeah!
